name: Juffair
tagline: Cosmopolitan high-rise living minutes from the sea
description: Juffair is Bahrain's most popular expat-friendly neighborhood — a dense district of modern towers, boutique restaurants, embassies, and the iconic Juffair Avenue and Block 338 dining quarter. Living here means walking distance to a global mix of coffee shops, gyms, supermarkets, and waterfront promenades.

name: Seef
tagline: Bahrain's central business and shopping district
description: Seef is the financial heart of Bahrain, home to City Centre Bahrain, Seef Mall, and Bahrain's tallest commercial towers. Premium offices, modern apartments, and unmatched access to retail, banking, and dining make Seef the address of choice for professionals.

name: Amwaj Islands
tagline: Man-made islands of waterfront villas and marina living
description: Amwaj Islands is Bahrain's premier island lifestyle development — a constellation of canals, lagoons, private marinas, and beachfront villas. The Lagoon, Marina, and Floating City offer everything from intimate cafés to luxury yacht moorings.

name: Riffa
tagline: Family-oriented neighborhoods with space and serenity
description: Riffa offers a quieter, family-focused alternative to the high-rise districts — sprawling villas, mature gardens, and Bahrain's famous Riffa Views golf community. Excellent international schools and ample space for growing families.

name: Bahrain Bay
tagline: Iconic waterfront skyline with Four Seasons and Avenues Mall
description: Bahrain Bay is the ambitious mixed-use waterfront masterplan anchored by Four Seasons Hotel Bahrain Bay and The Avenues Mall. New towers, premium offices, and panoramic sea-view residences define this fast-rising address.

name: Reef Island
tagline: Exclusive island address with private beach and reef
description: Reef Island is a small, gated island development off the coast of Manama — exclusive low-density living with private beach access, a coral reef preservation, marina berths, and the Reef Plaza retail core. Privacy and prestige in equal measure.

name: Saar
tagline: Suburban villa community with international schools
description: Saar is a leafy, low-rise western suburb favored by expat families. Spacious detached villas, the British School of Bahrain campus, Saar Mall, and easy access to King Fahd Causeway define the area.

name: Budaiya
tagline: Coastal village charm with date palm groves
description: Budaiya stretches along Bahrain's northern coast — a string of villages, date plantations, beach access, and a relaxed pace. Affordable family villas and apartments with a slice of traditional Bahrain.

name: Diplomatic Area
tagline: Embassies, banks, and Bahrain's most prestigious offices
description: The Diplomatic Area concentrates Bahrain's foreign embassies, headquarters of major banks, and prestige office towers. Premium commercial real estate and discreet executive residences define this carefully planned district.

name: Hidd
tagline: Affordable modern living on Muharraq Island
description: Hidd offers some of the best value modern apartments in Bahrain, on the eastern edge of Muharraq Island. New residential blocks, easy airport access, and proximity to industrial employment hubs make Hidd a strong rental market.
